reference: Good afternoon, Doctor. I had an open splenectomy performed on me exactly four weeks ago after an accident. The incision is completely healed, but I have this pain in my left side from my chest to my stomach. I have also received the pneumococcal vaccine. Do I have anything to worry about? Will I be able to go through a pregnancy? I am twenty-four years old. Thank you.
text: Good afternoon, doctor. I had an open spornectomy performed on me exactly four weeks ago after an accident. The incision has completely healed, but I have this pain in my left side from my chest and my stomach. I have also received a pneumococcal vaccine. Do I have anything to worry about? Will I be able to go through a pregnancy? I am 24 years old. Thank you.
